Authorization.ConnectionRequirementExplanation: To create and manage your budget data, Do I Have Money needs permission to access Google Drive and Google Sheets.
Authorization.ErrorMessage: It was not possible to authorize the access. Please try again later.
Authorization.RevokeAccessNotice: Access can be revoked anytime from your Google Account settings.
Authorization.StorageLine: Store your budget in your own Google account.

Budgets.NoBudgetsFound: No budgets found in your Google Drive.
Budgets.SelectOrCreate: Select an existing budget, import a budget shared with you from your Google Drive or create a new one to get started.
Budgets.SyncErrorMessage: Failed to load the budgets. Please refresh the page.

CreateNewBudget.CreateFailed: Failed to create budget. Please try again later.
CreateNewBudget.NameAlreadyExists: A budget with this name already exists.

Landing.Headline: Simple budgeting powered by Google Sheets.
Landing.HowItWorks: The app creates a folder called DoIHaveMoney in your Google Drive and stores one spreadsheet for each budget you create in it. It then reads and edits this spreadsheet with the budget data. The app only has access to files created by it.
Landing.SingInFailedMessage: Sing In failed, please try again later.
Landing.Slogan: Know exactly where your money is going.

MembersManager.ShareSuccessful: An email was sent with the invite.
